min_entry_age.source_quote: Minimum Age: The minimum entry age is 91 days. Children between 91 days and 5 years can be insured provided either parent is getting insured under this Policy.

max_entry_age.source_quote: Maximum Age: The maximum entry age is 65 years. There is no maximum cover ceasing age in this Policy.

max_renewal_age.source_quote: Life-long Renewal: We offer life-long renewal regardless of your health status or previous claims

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Basic Sum Insured per Insured Person per Policy Year (Rs. in Lakh) 3.00 5.00 10.00 15.00 20.00, 25.00, 50.00

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: Any treatment within first 30 days of cover except any accidental injury.

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Any Pre-existing diseases/conditions will be covered after a waiting period of 3 years.

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: 2 years exclusion for specific diseases like cataract, hernia, hysterectomy, joint replacement etc.

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Pregnancy, dental treatment, external aids and appliances. (listed under MAJOR EXCLUSIONS)

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: 1d) Day Care Procedures All Day Care Treatments Covered

ayush_coverage.source_quote: Non-allopathic treatment, congenital external diseases, cosmetic surgery (listed under MAJOR EXCLUSIONS)

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Pregnancy, dental treatment, external aids and appliances. (MAJOR EXCLUSIONS)

newborn_coverage.source_quote: Not covered in base (no newborn-specific benefit listed in brochure feature table)

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: 1f) Organ Donor Covered upto sum insured

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Bonus of 50% of the Basic Sum Insured for every claim free year, maximum upto 100%

restoration_benefit.value: 100% of Basic Sum Insured (one-time per policy year)
restoration_benefit.source_quote: 2) Restore Benefit Equal to 100% of Basic Sum Insured

room_rent_capping.source_quote: No sub-limit on room rent : With this health plan you can get the room you like and the treatment you deserve without a hassle.

copayment_pct.source_quote: No geography based sub-limits ... no additional copays or sub-limits.

deductible_amount.source_quote: No base deductible in Optima Restore

network_hospital_count.source_quote: Cashless transactions: Optim Restore enables you to get treated on a cashless basis across 10,000+ cashless network hospitals.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless transactions: Optim Restore enables you to get treated on a cashless basis across 10,000+ cashless network hospitals.

claim_settlement_ratio.source_quote: Insurer-level metric (IRDAI Annual Report); not extracted in this curation pass

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: Quick turnaround time: You do not have to worry about pre-authorization, we have a quick turnaround time. (No explicit hour count)

policy_type.source_quote: 1a) In-patient Treatment Covered upto sum insured (indemnity health plan)

_meta.notes: Parsed via pdfplumber from local brochure. CSR insurer-level (null).
